title: UMAP Virtual Screening and NCI-60 Activity Resources

data_urls.access_notes: Archive may contain larger data files; fetch explicitly.
Follow NCI data use and download instructions.

instructions: Inspect the UMAP split repository and Zenodo archive for reproducibility files.
Download NCI-60 screening data through the NCI portal if raw activity data are needed.
Track molecule identifiers, cell lines, activity labels, and split construction method.

recommended_axes.name: umap_cluster_distance
recommended_axes.definition: Distance or adjacency over molecular UMAP clusters.

recommended_axes.name: bioactivity_neighbor_overlap
recommended_axes.definition: Shared activity-neighborhood labels within a cell line; diagnostic if derived from held-out activity.

useful_for: Showing that random/scaffold/Butina/UMAP splits are operating points on a broader SPECTRA curve.
leakage_risks: Activity-neighborhood axes can leak held-out labels.
Cell-line-specific label imbalance can dominate chemical novelty.
Molecule canonicalization and duplicate compounds need explicit checks.
